legendaries.description:
Pyromancy Skills have a 5%[+] increased Critical Strike Chance and all of your Skills deal increased Direct damage equal to 10% of your Critical Strike Damage Bonus, up to 70%[x].

Current Direct Damage Bonus: -10%[x]
legendaries.name: Searing Heat

legendaries.description: Deal 90%[x] increased Burning damage.
legendaries.name: Burning Instinct

legendaries.description: Deal 60%[x] increased damage to Vulnerable enemies.
legendaries.name: Frigid Fate

legendaries.description: Your Frost Skills deal 35%[x] increased damage. This bonus is doubled and granted to all Skills if the enemy is Frozen or a Boss.
legendaries.name: Icefall

legendaries.description: Hitting enemies at least 8 times in a second with Shock Skills grants 30 Mana Regeneration and increases your damage by 50%[x] for 2 seconds.
legendaries.name: Static Surge

legendaries.description: While you have Crackling Energy charges, you deal 45%[x] increased damage. When you reach full charges, your Crackling Energy damage is increased by 4 times this amount until you run out of charges.
legendaries.name: Ceaseless Conduit

legendaries.description: Your Conjuration Skills have a 20%[x] reduced Cooldown or Mana cost. Casting a Conjuration Skill increases your damage with their element by 50%[x] for 6 seconds.
legendaries.name: Elemental Summoner

legendaries.description:
Increases your Enchantment Potency by 30%[+].
Each equipped Enchantment grants 40%[x] increased damage with their main element, and 60%[x] increased damage for the second Enchantment if it is a different element.
legendaries.name: Enchantment Master

legendaries.description: Casting a Pyromancy, Shock, or Frost Skill increases your Burning, Shocking, or Frostbite damage by 10% for 0.1 seconds. Each element only stacks once, maxing at 30%, with each element active.
legendaries.name: Fundamental Release

legendaries.description: Storm Skills deal 70%[x] increased damage, and 5%[x] Critical Strike Chance.
legendaries.name: Thunderstruck

legendaries.description: Your Earth Skills deal 70%[x] increased Critical Strike Damage.
legendaries.name: Earthen Devastation

legendaries.description: While in Werebear form, you deal 30%[x] increased damage or 45%[x] when you are at full Life. You have 1%[x] increased Overpower damage, up to 25%[x], for every 1%[x] difference in current Life percent and Fortified Life percent between you and the enemy.
legendaries.name: Survival Instincts

legendaries.description: Critical Strikes with Werewolf Skills restore 2 Spirit and deal 70%[x] increased damage.
legendaries.name: Lust for Carnage

legendaries.description: While a Poisoned enemy is Nearby, you deal 35%[x] increased damage, plus an additional 5%[x] for each additional Poisoned enemy, up to 4.
